name: organic-natural
description: Eco-conscious natural brand — earthy tones, organic textures, sustainable living
style: warm natural photography, organic textures, handcrafted feel, matte finishes
typography: rounded sans-serif headlines, serif body text with natural character
lighting: warm natural sunlight, golden hour, soft diffused shadows
visual_motifs: subtle linen or paper texture at 10% opacity, organic leaf patterns
do_list: Use natural materials in compositions (wood, stone, linen, clay)
Show real imperfections (grain, patina, natural wear)
prompt_suffix: Warm natural aesthetic with organic textures, golden hour lighting, authentic and sustainable mood.
